{{CargoOrgan
|name=Crimson Dragon Scale
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10836
|idx=41
|description=As the strongest dragon, the Crimson Dragon has both cunning and power. Many dragon slayers have become its desserts! To hurt it, even just making it shed a piece of scales, is an extremely difficult task.
|skill=
|hp=1434
|def=189
|atk=159
|rush=140
|gene1=In Dragon Form, {race} ATK +80
|gene2=In Dragon Form, {race} DEF +80
|gene3=In Dragon Form, {race} RUSH +80
|gene4=In Dragon Form, {race} HP +800
|gene7=In Dragon Form, {race} HARD +1% (Awakened)
|}}
